cues.name: Vogue
cues.description: On each measure, every light moves to its own random stage bearing over 800ms (set-position).

cues.name: Wave
cues.description: Horizontal linear sweep ±20° from home; half-cycle per beat (speed = BPM / 120).

cues.name: Nod
cues.description: Vertical linear sweep toward downstage and back; one full cycle per beat (speed = BPM / 60). Started on cue-started.

cues.name: Clockwise Sync
cues.description: Circle pattern; one full orbit per 4/4 measure (speed = BPM / 240).

cues.name: Counter-Clockwise Sync
cues.description: Same as Clockwise Sync with reverse direction.

cues.name: Clockwise Fan Spread
cues.description: Circle with 360° fan spread so fixtures are evenly phased around the orbit; measure-synced speed (BPM / 240).

cues.name: Counter-Clockwise Fan Spread
cues.description: Same as Clockwise Fan Spread with reverse direction.

cues.name: Pendulum
cues.description: Pan/tilt parabolic back-and-forth (sine pan, cosine tilt at 2x); one full cycle per two beats (speed = BPM / 120). Started on cue-started.

cues.name: Figure-8
cues.description: Infinity / figure-8 Lissajous in pan/tilt (sine pan, sine tilt at 2x); one full cycle per two beats (speed = BPM / 120). Started on cue-started.

cues.name: Vogue (Slow)
cues.description: Slow: On each measure, every light moves to its own random stage bearing over 1600ms (set-position).

cues.name: Wave (Slow)
cues.description: Slow: Horizontal linear sweep ±20° from home; half-cycle per beat (speed = BPM / 240).

cues.name: Nod (Slow)
cues.description: Slow: Vertical linear sweep toward downstage and back; one full cycle per beat (speed = BPM / 120).

cues.name: Clockwise Sync (Slow)
cues.description: Slow: Circle pattern; one full orbit per 4/4 measure (speed = BPM / 480).

cues.name: Counter-Clockwise Sync (Slow)
cues.description: Slow: Same as Clockwise Sync with reverse direction (speed = BPM / 480).

cues.name: Clockwise Fan Spread (Slow)
cues.description: Slow: Circle with 360° fan spread; measure-synced speed (BPM / 480).

cues.name: Counter-Clockwise Fan Spread (Slow)
cues.description: Slow: Same as Clockwise Fan Spread with reverse direction (BPM / 480).

cues.name: Pendulum (Slow)
cues.description: Slow: Pan/tilt parabolic back-and-forth (speed = BPM / 240).

cues.name: Figure-8 (Slow)
cues.description: Slow: Figure-8 Lissajous in pan/tilt (speed = BPM / 240).

cues.name: Still
cues.description: No motion: returns all lights to their home position.

cues.name: Searchlights
cues.description: Every 4 beats, each light wanders to random pan/tilt offsets within ±30° from home; movement duration spans 4 beats.

cues.name: Cross Beat
cues.description: Each beat, even fixtures tilt 30 degrees toward stage-right while odd fixtures tilt 30 degrees toward stage-left; sides swap each beat. Duration tracks beat length.

cues.name: Cross Beat Half
cues.description: Same alternating even/odd tilt toward stage bearings as Cross Beat, but only on every second beat; movement duration spans two beats.
